title: Making of Aantraa
description: How aantraa was built in a week — AI video translation, audio-to-MP3, captions, viral shorts, OpenRouter, FFmpeg, UploadThing, and 90+ languages under the hood.
author: Shrey

title: AI Audio & Video Translation — Free Credits, Pricing & Contact
description: Translate audio and video into 90+ languages with aantraa. Every new account gets 1 free starter minute, pay-as-you-go pricing after that, and B2B API solutions for agencies coming soon.
author: aantraa Team
